name: AMC Financial Holdings Inc.
summary: AMC Financial Holdings Inc. does not have significant operations. Previously, it was a consumer finance company, engaged in the selling and servicing of mortgage loans secured primarily by one- to four-family residences. It was formerly known as AMC Financial, Inc. AMC Financial changed its name to AMC Financial Holdings, Inc. in April 2004. The company was founded in 1985 and is based in Houston, Texas.
